# Курсы - Диспетчера (Course Dispatcher)

This is a Next.js project for managing and dispatching courses.

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Next.js project for course management and dispatching
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created Next.js 14 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, App Router
- [x] Customize the Project - Added base components and configuration
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No additional extensions needed
- [x] Compile the Project - Build successful with no errors
- [x] Create and Run Task - Added .vscode/tasks.json with dev, build, and lint tasks
- [x] Launch the Project - Development server ready to run
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md and copilot-instructions.md updated

## Project Details

- **Framework**: Next.js 14.2.35
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Linting**: ESLint
- **Routing**: App Router
- **Structure**: src/ directory layout
